title: neea constricta
intro: Neea constricta, a plant species found in the tropical regions of Central and South America, is a type of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the Memecylon genus. The medicinal properties of Neea constricta include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Neea constricta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat wounds and skin infections. Neea constricta is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
